improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion:
<meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try 3 free searches, then join from US$2/day.">
<meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant">
<meta property="og:description" content="Meet Gideon: a Claude-powered assistant built for business owners, traders, and professionals. Instant AI answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access. Start with 3 free searches.">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:image" content="https://yourdomain.com/og-gideon-preview.png">
<meta property="og:url" content="https://yourdomain.com/">
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
improvements.rationale: A clear meta description improves click-through rates from search results by communicating the core value proposition and free trial offer. Open Graph tags ensure professional, consistent previews when the homepage is shared on LinkedIn, Twitter, or Facebook—critical for B2B audiences. Including the pricing entry point and Claude-powered differentiator builds trust and sets expectations before the click.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat support, and a dedicated workspace for your business. Try three searches free — no credit card required."
improvements.rationale: This headline immediately introduces the product name and clearly states what it does, reducing cognitive load. The subheading highlights three key value props (instant answers, voice chat, workspace) and removes friction by emphasizing the free trial with no commitment. The structure moves visitors quickly from understanding to action.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be prompted to select a membership plan to continue. Choose from US$2 or US$7 per day, billed monthly or annually—with annual plans saving you 30 percent. As a member, you unlock unlimited access to Gideon's workspace, voice chat, and professional trade and business support.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in a freemium-to-paid model: what happens at the paywall. By clearly explaining the transition and immediately reinforcing the value of membership, it reduces uncertainty and supports conversion at the critical decision moment.
